raw_input:
[5.0/5] My husband really likes this product to help tame his ... My husband really likes this product to help tame his beard. He said he would purchase again. Doesn't make it feel greasy. [2.0/5] Didnt work out I bought this beard leave in conditioner for my husband. I wanted him try something different he's used beard oils and beard balms I wanted to try out this beard conditioner to see how it would work out for him.

He didn't like it at all unfortunately, it was heavy on his beard and left a white residue that never absorbed he ended up having to wash his beard he was not happy. I was really hoping it would work out and make his beard nice and soft and fluffy like leave in conditioners for the hair on your head . It doesn't have a scent.

He gave it 2 chances each time no success so he decided not to try it again.

I received this product at a discount for my honest and unbiased review [1.0/5] One Star smells like lard [4.0/5] eases dry skin This product helps to keep the skin under my whiskers free from drying out and causing flaking. Does the job! [5.0/5] Hooray for no more flakes and softer beard! I have really been enjoying the Bannerman beard leave-in conditioner. I purchased it with hopes it would help with summer flaking that hit as soon as the weather started staying about 100F. Even increasing my water intake hasn't been enough to compensate and I began to notice skin flakes coming out when I touched my beard, not only embarrassing but it began to get itchy as well. This 'beard-aide' product has helped tremendously in keeping the flaking to a minimal and I'm hoping that by continuing to use it, it will help reduce the flaking to nil. I apply just after showering and my beard and underlying skin are still damp. Once I have it dabbed in with finger tips, I use my comb and boar's hair brush to blend it thoroughly. With the residual on my hands, I've even gone ahead and rubbed it through my hair and have noticed its making my hair more manageable as well - definitely plus. Overall, I would recommend this product to guys that need a beard condition up and beyond the regular application of a beard oil to help fight dry whiskers and the skin underneath.
I am an Amazon Prime shopper that reviews products like this in exchange for a fair, honest and thorough review. Even though I received the Bannerman leave-in beard conditioner at a reduced cost, I have rated and reviewed it without bias, based solely on my experience. If at any time my opinions change about its effectiveness to condition my beard, I will update my review accordingly. If my review helped you in making up your mind about whether to purchase this product, [...], it tells the seller that folks are in fact reading reviews like this. Thank you! [4.0/5] I like that tis product leaves the beard very soft and ... I like that tis product leaves the beard very soft and manageable without being oily or greasy. I like the results, and I'm sure some users like that it is scent free, but I prefer a masculine scented product. [5.0/5] OMG this stuff works like just wow OMG this stuff works like just wow, is the best way to some it up for y'all. Once you apply this to your beard, you will notice there is no oily type of mess. Not on you or your clothes. This makes your facial hair look so well kept, its just awesome!

I got this since I got a discount for my review of this product, but dont let that matter. I have bought more of this for the present once this first bottle was done. I asure you I never put anything on my face that I dont back 100%. SO get you so also, and your welcome! [5.0/5] Awesome beard lotion A leave-in conditioner for your beard acts similar to a hair mask; put it in and leave it all day, and wash it out when you're ready. This isn't really a product for styling, but a product to fix that coarseness for that months-long fringe of hair on your face. Do you find the coarse curls on your beard no longer manageable? Have you never had a beard that long before? People do this all the time for our long hair.

Like I said, using this product is similar to using a hair conditioning mask, or leave-in conditioner. It will help your coarse facial hair obtain a silky, velvet condition. The texture is smooth and the oils are basic an without the perfume from smelly drugstore products. It feels like a great maintenance product for your beard.

There are a few guys who would like their scruffy faces-with-hair to be just as gruff as can be, but, then, there are the guys who love to be proud owners of facial hair that loves to be rubbed over their SO and their fun-loving family.

I just want to recommend this Beard Conditioner as a basic, good-ol'-fashioned product that uses natural ingredients to give you a fresh beard and a conditioned face... Face and hair do not need to be fighting each other, nor create problems for each other. This product allows your beard to feel good and your face ready to nuzzle.

Pros: Easy to Use, high quality and works great

Cons: none I've found so far

I received this product at a discount or free in exchange for my honest review. The opinions expressed here are unbiased and 100% my own. I review products based on my personal experiences and leave reviews reflecting those experiences. [4.0/5] My Husband Loves It For Taming His Grow Out...I Love it For Kisses That Don't Pick! I recently purchased this for my husband. He has decided to let his beard grow out some and it has been itchy and bothersome in the in between state. I was reading this product and thought it might be exactly what he needed so he didn't cave and shave it off. This is what he has reported after using it the last few days:

The first thing he noticed and was very happy with, is the almost complete lack of smell. It has just the hint of an, "unscented" scent, if that makes any sense. You will be able to use any cologne or aftershave in conjunction with this and they will not clash in any way.

It is thick as in "not runny" but is lightweight. Not heavy like a lotion. It is easy to apply and run through the hair. It reminds me personally of my straightening cream I put in my own hair after I wash it. It is very light and thin but he reports you can almost instantly feel your hair is smoother and softer. He noticed even after the very first use that his face itched less and his hair laid nicer. He put this in and then took a comb through his beard and he reported being more comfortable and more confident all day.

One of the things he really liked was this "tamed" his face. He is just in the early stages of growing out so things are not all full nor does everything lay the way he would like it to. This great little potion really helped that. Once he put it in and combed his beard he felt better about how he looked for the day, just a little bit more comfortable and confident.

So far this has been great and has really done what I hoped it would when I came across it ~ plus it kind of made me the hero so that is even better! I personally like it because it has taken the nasty picks out of giving him a kiss. I can tell you it definitely made his hair softer if nothing else!

I can't speak for anyone else, but I take my reviews seriously ~ I hope I have given some information that that has helped you out! I received this product at a discount for my honest and accurate review but I am not obligated to leave a positive review, nor do I receive any incentives or monetary compensation to do so. I would hope my review is not disregarded just because of this because it is truthful & sincere and I take a lot of what could be my down time writing them. My goal is to help buyers understand aspects of an item I would like to know before purchase. I am not affiliated with any company and am a normal consumer just like you. I pick items to review that I would normally want to purchase. (I don't do reviews for things I would already deem to be junk). I would never write a review for a product that is anything but my personal opinion and I have already purchased the product, nothing changes for me based on my review, but hopefully the time I put into writing can help someone out. Hope I was able to help ~ and please don't hesitate to ask me a question about any of the products I've reviewed; I am happy to help if I can! [5.0/5] nice and soft The best beard product I have ever used. My friend makes his own products and I really like his stuff, however, this is my current "go-to" beard product. It makes my beard nice and soft and also stay in place. [3.0/5] Not for Me!!! So this product has me torn, I like the fact that it is a lotion and not grease or oil based. Which made it much nicer to apply and come through the whole beard. It does give a nice grease free softness and shine that I thoroughly enjoyed.
The one thing I could not get over and had to go back with a Frances lotion and take away was the smell. Now I don't know if I received a bad bottle (some of the letters where rubbed heavily and fading off as if the bottle was pretty old. But the smell was like a mix between a lotion that had gone bad and feet not really stinky feet but feet none the less. It made me gag and I thought well maybe it was just I was used to my other beard conditioner. Um nope tried it the next day and it was just as bad. I'm sorry I really wanted to like the product but I do not and will not purchase again.
Although the smell may not bug some people and others may like it. Everyone is different but for me it was a no go. But the product did work I should add... [5.0/5] Great beard lotion! I am converted; I like beard lotions. No more will I deal with greasy feeling beard balms and oils. I had tried a few different products before this to tame my growing beard, and the biggest draw back was that my beard felt greasy all day.

I like to rest my chin in my hand while I work at my desk, and with the oils and balms, it would rub off on my hands, and I'd have to go wash them to prevent it from getting all over my work space. With the lotion, it absorbs before I get to work, and leaves the hair soft through the day.
I never really had any itching or dandruff, etc with my beard, so the lotion is intended to keep it soft, and keep it tamed.

The lotion is unscented, and has only a very light "lotion" scent to it. I prefer that compared to the balms and oils I have used in the past. I want my beard to smell like nothing. With this lotion, a little goes a long way. I was able to use a small bead of it to condition the beard and skin underneath. The first few times you use it, start with a small amount, and add more if you need it.

I would recommend this to a friend.

Use common sense when you read reviews from other people that received the product for free/discounted. It is true, I received this product at a discount or for free in exchange for my honest, un-biased opinion. However, I only choose to review products that I would have bought without the discount, and this review reflects my true opinion regardless of the price paid. [4.0/5] Four Stars Good stuff. Works as advertised. Unscented, but that's fine with me.

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews:

Overall, most customers are happy with this beard leave-in conditioner. The most common positives mentioned are that it softens and tames beards, helps with dry skin and flaking, is lightweight and non-greasy compared to oils and balms, absorbs well, and is unscented which allows use with cologne or aftershave. Several reviewers noted it works well on the skin underneath the beard too, reducing itching and flaking.

The main complaints were that one reviewer found it left a white residue and felt too heavy for their husband's beard, one reviewer said it smelled bad like feet or spoiled lotion, and one simply said it smells like lard. A couple of reviewers mentioned they would prefer a masculine scent over unscented.

Several reviewers noted they received the product at a discount in exchange for an honest review. The product appears to work best when applied to a damp beard after showering and combed through thoroughly. Most reviewers would recommend it to others looking for a non-greasy way to soften and manage their beard.
